login.title: Sign In
login.subtitle: Welcome back! Sign in to your account.

error.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.

register.title: Create Account
register.subtitle: Join just-eat.ch and order your favorite food.
register.success: Account created successfully! Please check your email to verify.

error.emailExists: An account with this email already exists.
error.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.success: If an account exists with this email, you will receive a password reset link.

error.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.

resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter your new password below.
resetPassword.success: Password reset successfully! You can now sign in.
resetPassword.invalidToken: Invalid or expired reset link. Please request a new one.

error.tokenExpired: This reset link has expired. Please request a new one.
error.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters.
validation.passwordUppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter.
validation.passwordLowercase: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter.
validation.passwordDigit: Password must contain at least one digit.
validation.passwordSpecial: Password must contain at least one special character (@$!%*?&).
validation.firstNameMax: First name must be at most 100 characters.
validation.firstNameInvalid: First name can only contain letters, spaces, hyphens, and apostrophes.
validation.lastNameMax: Last name must be at most 100 characters.
validation.lastNameInvalid: Last name can only contain letters, spaces, hyphens, and apostrophes.
validation.phoneInvalid: Please enter a valid phone number.
validation.termsRequired: You must agree to the terms and conditions.

partner.title: Partner with just-eat.ch
partner.subtitle: Register your restaurant and reach thousands of hungry customers across Switzerland.
partner.applicationNotePlaceholder: Describe your cuisine, specialties, or any additional information...
partner.success: Application submitted! We'll review it and get back to you shortly.

validation.phoneRequired: Phone number is required for restaurant owners.
validation.restaurantNameMax: Restaurant name must be at most 200 characters.
validation.addressMax: Address must be at most 300 characters.
validation.postalCodeInvalid: Please enter a valid Swiss postal code (4 digits).

courier.title: Become a just-eat.ch Courier
courier.subtitle: Earn money on your own schedule delivering food across Switzerland.
courier.applicationNotePlaceholder: Share your delivery experience or availability...
courier.success: Application submitted! We'll review it and get back to you shortly.

validation.phoneRequired: Phone number is required for couriers.
validation.ageMinimum: You must be at least 18 years old.

applicationStatus.title: Application Status
applicationStatus.loginRequiredDesc: Please log in to check your application status.
applicationStatus.errorDesc: We couldn't load your application status. Please try again later.
applicationStatus.noApplicationDesc: You haven't submitted an application yet. Would you like to partner with us or become a courier?
applicationStatus.step1: Our team will review your application within 1–3 business days.
applicationStatus.step2: You'll receive an email notification once your application has been reviewed.
applicationStatus.step3: Once approved, you can start using the platform right away!

statusDesc.none: You haven't submitted an application yet.
statusDesc.pending_approval: Your application is being reviewed by our team. We'll notify you once a decision has been made.
statusDesc.approved: Congratulations! Your application has been approved. You can now access your dashboard.
statusDesc.rejected: Unfortunately, your application was not approved at this time.
